aeo_readiness.summary: AI assistants are likely to cite Full Spectrum HVAC Service due to their strong local presence and decent content, but improvements in structured data and conversational content are needed to maximize visibility.
quick_wins: Implement FAQPage schema to address common HVAC queries.
Expand content to include detailed, conversational answers to common HVAC questions.

gbp_analysis.summary: The Google Business Profile is well-optimized with positive reviews, photos, and accurate information, but lacks regular posts and Q&A engagement.
critical_issues: No recent posts or updates on GBP.
No engagement with customer Q&A on the profile.

nap_citations.summary: NAP consistency is perfect with no issues detected.
action_items: Maintain current NAP consistency across all platforms.
Regularly monitor for any inconsistencies or new citation opportunities.

schema_gaps: No HowTo schema for common HVAC tasks
LocalBusiness schema could be enhanced with more detailed properties

ai_visibility_gap.primary_gap: Lack of structured data and conversational content limits AI citations.
ai_visibility_gap.invisible_for: Queries related to emergency HVAC services and detailed repair explanations.
ai_visibility_gap.low_hanging_fruit: Implementing FAQPage schema and adding a Q&A section to the website.
ai_visibility_gap.authority_opportunity: Positioning as HVAC experts by creating in-depth content on complex topics like energy efficiency and HVAC technology trends.

agency_pitch.hook: Unlock AI-driven leads by making your HVAC expertise undeniable.
agency_pitch.pain_point: Without AI-ready content and structured data, you're missing out on 40% of potential leads from voice and AI search.
agency_pitch.proof_point: Competitors with FAQ schema and conversational content are more frequently cited by AI assistants.
agency_pitch.solution: Our AEO approach integrates structured data, conversational content, and authority-building strategies to ensure AI models recognize you as the go-to HVAC expert.
agency_pitch.impact_estimate: Expect a 30-40% increase in AI-driven leads within 3-6 months.
agency_pitch.urgency: Waiting means losing ground to competitors who are already optimizing for AI search.

email_subject_line: Maximize Your AI Visibility: Are You Ready for the Future of HVAC Search?
opening_line: We analyzed your website and identified key opportunities to enhance your visibility with AI search and voice assistants.
cta: Let's schedule a call to discuss how we can optimize your online presence for AI-driven growth.
